findings.evidence: Lines 59-61 set only `letI := hreg.fiber_isPretransitive b` and `letI := fiber_isCancelSMul (b := b) hp` before calling Mathlib's `MulAction.equivSubgroupOrbitsQuotientGroup`; Mathlib source `GroupTheory/GroupAction/Quotient.lean` has signature `[IsPretransitive G X] [IsCancelSMul G X] (H : Subgroup G)`.
findings.fix: State the primitive theorem with local action hypotheses, e.g. `[MulAction.IsPretransitive (Deck p) (p ⁻¹' {b})] [IsCancelSMul (Deck p) (p ⁻¹' {b})]` (or `[PreconnectedSpace E] (hp : IsCoveringMap p)` plus the local pretransitivity instance), then derive the regular-cover versions from `hreg.fiber_isPretransitive b` and `fiber_isCancelSMul`.
findings.issue: `regularSubgroupFiberOrbitQuotientEquivQuotientGroup` and all following lemmas require `hreg : IsRegular p`, which includes global surjectivity and transitivity on every fibre, but the proofs only use transitivity of the single fibre over `b`.

summary: The new API proves the desired regular-cover specialization, but its hypotheses are stronger than the fixed-fibre quotient statement needs.
